---
title: "Resume"
---

# Education
 
<p style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
  <span>
  University of British Columbia, Vancouver, BC<br>
  Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management
  </span>
  <span>Sept. 2025 - May 2026</span>
</p>

<p style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
  <span>
  University of British Columbia, Vancouver, BC<br>
  Bachelor of Wood Products Processing, Minor in Commerce
  </span>
  <span>Sept. 2022 - May 2025</span>
</p>

<p style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
  <span>
  Beijing Forestry University, Beijing, China<br>
  Bachelor of Wood Science and Engineering
  </span>
  <span>Sept. 2019 - June 2022</span>
</p>

# Publications

*Peer-reviewed publications:*

-   List any peer-reviewed publications here.

# Awards & Honors

-   List any scholarships, bursaries, etc.
